user.title: Connect to Spectra Watermaker
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Spectra Connect module.

data_description.host: The IP address of your Spectra Connect module (e.g., 192.168.1.100)

options.title: Watermaker Options
options.description: Configure optional power management and tank sensors. All fields are optional.

data_description.power_switch: Switch entity that controls power to the watermaker (e.g., a smart outlet)
data_description.power_sensor: Sensor that measures the watermaker outlet's power draw in watts
data_description.tank_sensor_port: Sensor providing port tank level as a percentage
data_description.tank_sensor_stbd: Sensor providing starboard tank level as a percentage
data_description.tank_full_threshold: Stop the watermaker when any tank reaches this level for 30 seconds

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Spectra watermaker. Check the IP address and ensure the device is powered on.

data_description.auto_off_delay: Minutes to wait after idle before turning off the outlet. Set to 0 to disable.

start.name: Start watermaker
start.description: Start the watermaker with the full boot and start sequence.

duration_hours.name: Duration
duration_hours.description: Run duration in hours (0.5-8.0). Uses the configured default if omitted.

stop.name: Stop watermaker
stop.description: Stop the watermaker. Triggers a freshwater flush cycle.

flush.name: Flush watermaker
flush.description: Trigger a manual freshwater flush from idle.

get_run_history.name: Get run history
get_run_history.description: Returns the last N production runs with stats.

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Number of runs to return (1-50, default 10).
